content.question: What is the magnitude of causal effect attributable specifically to 6/8-year gimnázium age-10/12 selection versus the broader 3-way secondary track system (gimnázium/vocational secondary/vocational vocational) on equity outcomes such as SES gradients, intergenerational mobility, and ethnic segregation?
content.reduction_path: Conduct matched-cohort or regression-discontinuity analysis comparing post-1990 cohorts with varying exposure to 6/8-year selection (before/after implementation) to peers in regions or earlier cohorts without such programs, isolating the incremental effect of the early selection layer net of the later 3-way track split.
